task_completion.description: OpenOffice Writer is open with the menu document
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Apache OpenOffice Writer application window is visible, containing text related to 'Thornfield Kitchen & Garden' or 'Spring 2025 Dinner Menu'.

task_completion.description: A Table of Contents is included in the document
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Table of Contents block is visible, listing the menu categories (e.g., Starters, Seafood) with corresponding page numbers.

task_completion.description: Menu categories are formatted using heading styles
task_completion.visual_evidence: Category names like 'Starters', 'Soups & Salads', or 'Seafood' appear in a larger, distinct font indicating a Heading 1 style.

task_completion.description: Menu items are organized in tables
task_completion.visual_evidence: Grid lines or a clear tabular layout containing columns for Dish, Description, and Price under each category.

task_completion.description: Specific menu items and their correct prices are visible
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for items like 'Ramp & Ricotta Crostini' with price 16, 'Diver Scallops' with price 38, or 'Grass-Fed NY Strip' with price 46 within the tables.

task_completion.description: Page numbers are visible on the document pages
task_completion.visual_evidence: Numbers are visible in the header or footer area of the document pages.

task_completion.description: The document is saved with the correct filename
task_completion.visual_evidence: The filename 'thornfield_spring_menu_2025.odt' is visible in the OpenOffice Writer title bar or in a save dialog.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenOffice Writer GUI to create the document
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the OpenOffice Writer interface (menus, toolbars, dialogs) rather than just terminal commands generating the file.

integrity.description: The agent used the table feature rather than manual spacing
integrity.visual_evidence: The presence of table gridlines, table formatting toolbars, or the Table menu being accessed, rather than text aligned with spaces or tabs.

integrity.description: The agent generated a Table of Contents rather than typing it manually
integrity.visual_evidence: The Table of Contents has a gray background (typical for generated fields in OpenOffice) or the Insert Index/Table dialog is seen.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Restaurant: Thornfield Kitchen & Garden. Categories (Heading 1): Starters, Soups & Salads, Pasta & Grains, Seafood, Meat & Poultry, Desserts. Sample items and prices to verify: Ramp & Ricotta Crostini (16), Duck Liver Mousse (19), Morel Mushroom Pappardelle (28), Diver Scallops (38), Grass-Fed NY Strip (46), Meyer Lemon Tart (14). The document must have 6 tables (one for each category) and be saved as thornfield_spring_menu_2025.odt.
